payload.over: publishing the @sofar/schema workspace package to npm under its bare name (name-collides with a private workspace package in sofar-cloud; D13 — names are permanent, one stewarded artifact beats a second package), or a single "." main export (couples CLI-oriented and library-oriented consumers; subpaths keep the bin-only root intact)

payload.cmd:
cd /private/tmp/claude-501/-Users-jins-IO-sofar/09f165a7-be8e-4199-bf63-8ca8cb9cc46c/scratchpad && python3 - <<'EOF'
import json
rows = json.load(open("rows.json"))
series = json.load(open("series.json"))

# exemplar exact numbers
for sid in ("15d73824","40da08b2","8f5d3e5d","39e49fe8","c2451e35","c747c304"):
    r = next(r for r in rows if r["sid"]==sid)
    print(r["sid"], r["proj"], r["bucket"], "calls",r["calls"],"turns",r["turns"],
          "cr",r["cr"],"cw",r["cw"],"out",r["out"],"$",r["cost"],"first",r["first"][:16],"last",r["last"][:16])

# downsample long series to <=130 pts for the chart
def ds(a, n=130):
    if len(a) <= n: return a
    step = len(a)/n
    return [a[int(i*step)] for i in range(n)] + [a[-1]]

blob = {
  "components": [
    {"label":"Cache reads","usd":206.35,"tokens":217044522},
    {"label":"Cache writes (1h TTL)","usd":68.81,"tokens":3562842},
    {"label":"Cache writes (5m TTL)","usd":39.16,"tokens":3936611},
    {"label":"Output","usd":55.46,"tokens":1269720},
    {"label":"Uncached input","usd":0.38,"tokens":38135},
  ],
  "sessions": sorted([{"sid":r["sid"],"proj":r["proj"],"bucket":r["bucket"],"cost":r["cost"]} for r in rows], key=lambda x:-x["cost"]),
  "series": {k: {"sid":v["sid"][:8], "prefix": ds(v["prefix"])} for k,v in series.items()},
}
json.dump(blob, open("blob.json","w"))
print("blob sizes:", {k: len(v["prefix"]) for k,v in blob["series"].items()}, "sessions:", len(blob["sessions"]))
EOF

cd /private/tmp/claude-501/-Users-jins-IO-sofar/09f165a7-be8e-4199-bf63-8ca8cb9cc46c/scratchpad && python3 - <<'EOF'
blob = open("blob.json").read()
html = open("context-rent.html").read()
assert "__DATA_BLOB__" in html
open("context-rent.html","w").write(html.replace("__DATA_BLOB__", blob))
print("injected", len(blob), "bytes; final size", len(html)-len("__DATA_BLOB__")+len(blob))
EOF

B="$HOME/.claude/skills/gstack/browse/dist/browse"; [ -x "$B" ] && echo READY || echo NEEDS_SETUP; $B viewport 1200x900 >/dev/null 2>&1; $B goto "file:///private/tmp/claude-501/-Users-jins-IO-sofar/09f165a7-be8e-4199-bf63-8ca8cb9cc46c/scratchpad/context-rent.html" && $B console --errors; $B screenshot /private/tmp/claude-501/-Users-jins-IO-sofar/09f165a7-be8e-4199-bf63-8ca8cb9cc46c/scratchpad/render-full.png
npm test 2>&1 | grep -E 'Test Files|Tests ' && npm run typecheck 2>&1 | tail -2

payload.summary: Side-quest analysis session: measured cached-prompt usage/cost across all Claude Code transcripts Jul 11-12 (66 sessions, 1,891 calls) and published the "Context rent" artifact comparing Claude Code-native continuity vs sofar-record continuity. Headlines: $370 API-equivalent total, cache reads = 96.6% of prompt tokens ($206), 11 long context-carrying sessions = 91% of spend (one 21h session $172 at ~$0.40/call context rent) vs $0.87-$1.42 for complete sofar write-back sessions; sofar overhead ~$0.15/session. No library-surface code touched.
